how.title: How does it work?
how.text: Use Calculator to estimate your quantities, then Projects to find your saved calculations. For full tracking, create a Site and save the results step by step. Remember to export as JSON to back up your data.

plumbing.series_help: Series distribution reduces pipe length but can be harder to balance.
plumbing.warn_hot_needed_no_heater: Hot water needed but no heater selected.

ui.vapor_help: Recommended with insulation depending on build-up.

warn.flat_roof_material: Flat roofs require specific waterproofing systems.

screed.fluid_help: Fluid screeds require specific products and pumping.
screed.light_bag_help: Lightweight mix (ravoirage) reduces weight and improves leveling.

foundations.warn_spoil_management: No spoil management selected (neither disposal nor reuse).

paint.1: Always apply a primer on bare surfaces (drywall, plaster) to reduce absorption.
paint.2: Cross-coat (horizontal then vertical) to avoid streaks.
paint.3: Avoid painting above 25°C (too fast drying) or below 10°C.

concrete.1: Respect water dosage: too much water weakens concrete (shrinkage, cracks).
concrete.2: For a driveable slab, aim for 12–15cm thickness + ST25C mesh.
concrete.3: Lift the mesh with spacers so it sits in the concrete, not on the ground.
concrete.4: Plan expansion joints every 15–20m² to prevent cracking.

warnings.tile: A dedicated bonding primer is required
warnings.wood: Fibre-reinforced leveling compound is required on wood

quick.page_subtitle: Standalone tools for conversions, net areas, packaging, timber decking, detailed drywall, detailed tiling, roofing, fencing, gravel / fill and insulation.

cards.convert: Area, volume, litres and estimated bags.
cards.slope: Slope in %, cm/m, angle and real length.
cards.linear: Overlaps, wastage and number of linear pieces.
cards.voltage_drop: Cable section, voltage drop and recommendation.
cards.decking: Boards, joists, pedestals and stainless screws.
cards.drywall_frame: Partitions, linings, ceilings, tracks and studs.
cards.tile_detailed: Tiles, adhesive, grout, skirting and primer.
cards.roof_frame: Pitch, roof area, rafters, battens and tiles.
cards.bulk_fill: Volume, tonnage, bulk bags and geotextile.
cards.insulation: Area, thickness, R-value and insulation rolls.

quick.warn_openings: Openings area exceeds the gross area.
quick.warn_voltage_high: High voltage drop: review section or length.
quick.warn_voltage_medium: Voltage drop exceeds 3%; check depending on use.

summary.net_area: Net area: {{net}} m², or {{withWaste}} m² incl. wastage.
summary.voltage: Voltage drop: {{volts}} V ({{percent}} %). Recommended section: {{section}} mm².

quick.note: Results are indicative and intended for quick jobsite estimates. Always verify technical constraints, manufacturer spacing and installation rules before execution.
